data.merge:
Paw Slap

After you roll dice for a Magic Check or Accuracy Check, you may choose one of the numbers shown on those dice: that number becomes your meowgic nyamber and replaces any meowgic nyamber you previously obtained.

After a creature you can see rolls dice for a Check, if you have a meowgic nyamber, you may expend it to replace the number shown by one of those dice with that number. You cannot use this effect on a Check that generated a meowgic nyamber, and you cannot generate a meowgic nyamber with a Check you used this effect on.

When this Arcanum is dismissed, if you have a meowgic nyamber, you lose it.
data.dismiss:
Coin Cascade

You deal 30 physical damage to every enemy you can see. If you lost a meowgic nyamber by dismissing this Arcanum, the type of this damage changes based on the number you lost: air (1 and 6), bolt (2 and 7), fire (3 and 8), ice (4 and 9), earth (5 and 10), dark (11 or higher).

Enemies Suffer: @DMG[&step(30,40,50) physical]{Physical Damage}, @DMG[&step(30,40,50) air]{Air Damage}, @DMG[&step(30,40,50) bolt]{Bolt Damage}, @DMG[&step(30,40,50) fire]{Fire Damage}, @DMG[&step(30,40,50) ice]{Ice Damage}, @DMG[&step(30,40,50) earth]{Earth Damage}, or @DMG[&step(30,40,50) dark]{Dark Damage}

effects.name: Merged: Maneki-Neko
effects.description: You are merged with Maneki-Neko. You can use this to track your meowgic nyamber.
